Thanks for contributing to the UK DVS trust framework workspace.
Please fill in as much of this template as applies to your change.

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing what this PR does and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Typo or correction (spelling, punctuation, capitalisation)
- [ ] Clarity / plain-English improvement (wording, no change in meaning)
- [ ] Structural or navigation change (READMEs, links, folder layout)
- [ ] Accessibility improvement (alt text, headings, reading order, contrast)
- [ ] Supporting material (diagrams, examples, mappings, annexes)
- [ ] Policy feedback — this PR **does** change the meaning of a published rule
- [ ] Tooling / CI / workflows
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Files touched

<!-- Paste the relative paths of files changed, or a short summary. -->

## If this PR changes published rule meaning

- [ ] I have flagged this clearly in the summary above.
- [ ] I understand this PR may be held open pending OfDIA review rather than merged directly, in line with [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md).

## Repository invariants

- [ ] Every Markdown file I have added or modified still begins with the standard caution block.
- [ ] I have not removed or altered the caution block on any existing file.
- [ ] Local navigation links I have touched still resolve.
- [ ] Image references I have touched still point to filenames under `/media`.
